description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'macOS' that triggers on push and workflow dispatch events. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run on macOS-13 and macOS-15 environments with Debug, Release, DevDist, and LuaDist build types. For each job, check out the code, unshallow the Git repository if necessary, download nCine-libraries artifacts and nCine-data, configure and build with CMake, and package and push artifacts to a deployment branch.
